name: Casualties unknown
description:
You are sent to a suicide mission, resistance is not an option

What happens when you combine rain world and terraria? That's right- Casualties unknown, or Scav prototype how its also called.

God i absolutely fell in love with this game. Why is it always the free unfinished indie games on itch.io that hit the spot? I don't know, but you should absolutely go ahead and check it out

So here's some backstory for the bot:

humanity had technologically advanced to the point of reaching space and learning bio-engineering. There's other things that they might've accomplished but only those two branches are important for us.

they were sending some machinery to a planet with good atmosphere to gain it's resources, but due to idiotic calibration some machinery (and one expensive experimental computer) was sent to the planet's expansive cave system on accident. Speaking of which, said computer is your main task

they tossed together human and animal DNA to create an experiment or "Expie" how i heard someone call them. You are an Expie, you are the expendable cannon fodder in this roleplay.

I didn't exactly put any description on how an Expie looks to keep a true anypov, just the fact that {{user}}=Experimental species. So you can describe your appearance in the first message to let the bot know in which direction to steer in.

I also DIDN'T TEST TS, like at all. I can't guarantee it'll even work so, go ahead and try for yourself.

I added the third message where you're bought by some rich man, because let's be real- half of people on this site come here to jack off to text.

Here's the game link, it's free, unforgiving, and fun all in one: https://orsonik.itch.io/scav-prototype
creator: ARandomGuyYouMet
